Screen Text (Figma):
Button: "I'm ready - let's go"
Button: "I'll come back later"
AI Voice:
[Plays automatically after auth]

"Welcome, [Name]. [OR 'Welcome.'] I'm your AI coach inside Guided Growth, and I'm going to be with you from here on.

This isn't an app that gives you a list and hopes for the best. You'll talk to me in the morning. You'll talk to me at night. And between those two moments, the habits you want will start happening - not because you're forcing them, but because we're removing what's in the way.

This setup takes about three to five minutes. This is probably the longest we'll ever talk. After this, your check-ins are between 30 seconds and a couple of minutes, depending on how much you want to share. And those few minutes a day? They're designed to save you time - not add to your schedule. When the right habits click into place, you stop wasting energy on the things that weren't working. That's time back. Real time.

Everything you share with me - your mood, your habits, your reflections - we use all of it to give you better insights and to keep improving this experience. But here's the thing: your data is anonymized from the first second. We never connect it to you personally. So you get deep, real reflections about your life - without anyone knowing it's you. That's the best of both worlds.

When you're ready, let's begin."

Partial / Ambiguous / Edge Cases:
CORE RULE: AI identifies what it got, asks ONLY for what's missing. Never re-asks what it already captured.

PARSING PRIORITY: Name > Age > Gender > Referral. If NLP only catches some fields, fill those and ask for the rest in order.

CONFIRMATION APPROACH: AI does NOT read back every field robotically. It weaves confirmation naturally:
Good: "Great to meet you, Sarah. And how old are you?"
Bad: "I got name: Sarah. Now I need age. Please provide age."

NLP CATCHES PARTIAL:
If voice says "I'm Sarah, thirty-two, I found you on TikTok" and NLP gets name + age + referral but misses gender:
AI: "Hey Sarah, 32 - got it. And how do you identify? Male, female, or other?"

FULL NAME -> FIRST NAME:
"Sarah Johnson" -> nickname = Sarah. Don't ask "Should I call you Sarah or Sarah Johnson?" Just use first name.

TAP + VOICE MIX:
User might type name, say age via voice, tap gender, skip referral. All valid. System checks which fields are filled regardless of input method.

AGE EDGE CASES:
Under 13: Block account creation. "This app is for users 13 and older."
13-17: Allow but note as minor in user_profile for any content sensitivity.
"Late twenties" / "mid thirties": Ask for specific number or suggest one ("Around 35?").

GENDER REFUSES:
"None of your business" / aggressive refusal: "Totally fair. I'll skip that one." Set as Other. No follow-up.

REFERRAL NOT CRITICAL:
If user fills name + age + gender and taps 'Let's Begin' without referral, allow it. Set referral as 'Other'. Do not block onboarding for this field.

LET'S BEGIN WITHOUT ALL FIELDS:
Name is required. Age is required. Gender defaults to Other if skipped. Referral defaults to Other if skipped.
If name OR age missing: show inline prompt "Please tell us your name and age before continuing."
Notes:
Voice auto-fills form in real-time - magic moment #1.
Gender synonyms: boy/man/guy/dude -> Male, girl/woman/lady -> Female, non-binary/other -> Other

Expected User Response & Variations:
DELETE: "Yes" / "Delete it" / Tap Delete Habit
KEEP: "No" / "Keep it" / "Never mind" / Tap Keep Habit
AI Response:
DELETE: "Done. If you ever want it back, just ask."
KEEP: "Keeping it. Good call."
System Action:
1. Soft-delete: status = 'deleted', deleted_at = now()
2. Cancel scheduled reminders
3. Navigate to Home
4. Log PostHog: delete_habit {habit_name, lifetime_days, total_completions, completion_rate}
Partial / Ambiguous / Edge Cases:
No streak mentioned if streak is 0.
If streak is very long (30+): "That's a [X]-day streak you'd be ending. Sure about this?"

User hesitates: "Take your time. No rush."
Notes: Anti-guilt design. Deletion should feel OK.

Screen / State:
Voice fails to load
(TTS provider down)
AI Voice:
[Fallback: show text version of what AI would have said as a toast/banner]

If persistent: "Voice is temporarily unavailable. You can still use everything - just tap instead of talking."
System Action:
1. Try TTS provider with 3-second timeout
2. If fail: fall back to text display
3. Set voice_available = false for session
4. Log error to Sentry
5. Retry on next interaction
Partial / Ambiguous / Edge Cases: Don't block the user. Everything should work without voice, just less magical.
Notes: Voice is enhancement, not requirement. App must work without it.

AI Voice:
"Hmm, that didn't save. Let me try again." [Auto-retry]

If retry fails: "I'm having trouble saving right now. Your data is safe - I'll try again in a moment."
System Action:
1. Retry save 2x with exponential backoff
2. If fails: queue in local storage
3. Retry on next app open
4. Log error to Sentry
Partial / Ambiguous / Edge Cases: Never lose user data. Queue locally if server is down.
Notes: User should never worry about lost data.

AI Voice: "I didn't hear anything. Could you try again? Make sure your mic is on."
Expected User Response & Variations: User retries
AI Response:
If second attempt works: normal flow
If fails again: "Looks like I'm having trouble hearing you. You can type instead."
System Action:
1. Check mic permissions
2. If no permission: prompt browser mic permission
3. If permission granted but still failing: suggest text fallback
4. Log STT failure to Sentry
Partial / Ambiguous / Edge Cases: After 2 failed attempts, suggest text input. Don't keep asking them to repeat.
Notes: Always have a text fallback path.
